message:
fix(cli): improve robustness of file handling, auth flow, and test infrastructure

This commit addresses several reliability issues discovered during testing:

variables.ts - Add directory-as-file protection:
- Add stats.isFile() check before reading 'file' type variables
- Prevents cryptic errors when user accidentally passes a directory path
- Clear error message: "Path is not a file for variable X: /path"

login.ts - Fix callback server error propagation:
- Previously, server.on("error") only called reject(), leaving the
  token promise dangling on port conflicts or bind failures
- Now also calls rejectToken(err) to properly fail the entire flow
- Prevents hung login attempts when port 9876 is in use

spawn.ts - Use explicit SIGKILL for timeout termination:
- Replace proc.kill() with proc.kill("SIGKILL") for deterministic
  process termination on timeout
- Default SIGTERM may be caught/ignored by some processes, causing
  test hangs when CLI commands don't terminate cleanly

login.test.ts - Refactor to mock-based testing:
- Replace filesystem-based credential mocking with proper module mocks
- More reliable test isolation without temp directory races
- Consolidate redundant test describe blocks
- Remove duplicate tests that were covered by other cases

Together these changes make the CLI more robust for edge cases and
the test suite more maintainable and reliable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
